message:
Running command: # Check the librelane version and PDK version expectations
librelane --version 2>&1 | head -5
echo "---"
# Find where librelane stores PDK version expectations
python3 -c "
import subprocess, sys
result = subprocess.run(['librelane', '--pdk-root', '/nc/pdk', '--pdk', 'sky130A', '--print-resolved-config', '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/config.json'], capture_output=True, text=True)
print(result.stdout[:500])
print('STDERR:', result.stderr[:200])
" 2>/dev/null | head -20
